# Moedim

> Moedim turns African smallholder botanicals into verified, traceable, buyer-ready ingredients. Thirteen Kenyan-grown oils, every lot GC-MS or fatty acid profiled, traceable from farm to dispatch. Sold by the bottle and by the kilogram. Headquartered in Mount Kenya with EU operations in Rotterdam and US holding in Delaware.

## For buyers

- [Buyer supply desk](https://www.moedimai.com/buyers.md): MoedimAI for cosmetic, fragrance, and wellness buyers. Thirteen Kenyan botanicals available by the kilogram with full documentation.

## For consumers

- [Shop the botanicals](https://www.moedimai.com/shop.md): Kenyan essential and botanical oils sold by the bottle.

## For investors and partners

- [Company thesis](https://www.moedimai.com/thesis.md): Chemotype-verification infrastructure for African organic exports. Three hundred farmers live, three thousand in pipeline, nine crops, five tonnes per day of processing capacity.

## For farmers

- [Jaribu by Moedim](https://www.moedimai.com/jaribu.md): Above-market prices for biomass, organic input support, and a path to certified export markets.

## Knowledge

- [The Moedim Journal](https://www.moedimai.com/journal.md): Buyer-useful, evidence-led writing on African botanical supply.

## Contact

- [Contact](https://www.moedimai.com/contact.md): vivian@moedimai.com. Routed forms by audience.
